sections.title: Before talking to Captain Pudi with level 35 Fishing

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, what are yo...

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Sorry, can't talk to ye right now. Busy with paperwork. If ye need anythin', talk t' Captain Pudi over by the dock.

sections.title: After talking to Captain Pudi with level 35 Fishing

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: What can I do for ye? I be quite busy with paperwork.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I heard about your ship. Can you tell me what happened?

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Aye, I can tell ye what happened.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: We be out on our fortnightly fishin' trip, I was doin' me normal work. Setting up the nets, swabbing the deck and the like.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: 'Twas a good hawl t' start, plenty of manta ray and snappers. But we would be movin' on the next day to our deep sea fishin' spot.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: 'Twas nothin' but smooth sailin' to our deep sea spot near Karamja, but on the way I noticed more debris in the water than usual.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of debris? Was it ship debris?

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Aye, 'twas. Most of the time, it be nets or items people throw off ships that they don't need. This had me worried a bit.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: There was a lack of fish in the water, 'twas kind of... eerie.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: The next day, Koanee changed the ship's course, but that be because of a storm on the horizon.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: But the storm seemed t' be... following us. As if it had a mind of its own.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: The wind started a blowin' and the fog started a showin', huge waves crashing against the boat.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: The ship started fallin' apart. I rushed to the cook's quarters and found 'im layin' on the floor with a plank over 'im.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: I brought 'im up to the top deck and tied 'im to a piece of loose wood. I did the same t' the Skipper and Navigator.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh my, that's awful! You're very lucky you didn't get hit.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Aye, it be lucky indeed. But that not be the end of it. As the ship finished sinking, I balanced out the wood so we did not slip.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: In the distance I saw glowing eyes and a large monster sorta thing in the fog movin' t'wards us.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: But all of a sudden, it vanished. I then had to keep us afloat 'till we made it t' shore by Al Kharid.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Pudi gathered us up and we went t' the Chancellor as soon as we could stand.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: These ruins turned out t' be a great base to research the beast from undisturbed! Bit close to Menaphos though, aye?

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: That be the end of me story. Can I help ye with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A pirate doing paperwork, that's new.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Let me guess, ye thought we be doin' nothing but pluderin' and pillagin'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that not what pirates do?

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Ye be a funny one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Glad you can still smile after what happened.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: I'm not goin' t' let one bit of bad luck keep me down.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Can I help ye with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips for fighting Tempoross?

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Tempoross can summon clouds that shoot lightnin'. They can cause fires that will block ye from movin' about as freely.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Ye best be ready to grab a bucket and douse the fire before it spreads!

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Can I help ye with anythin' else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Stay safe, ye hear?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you care for an egg in this difficult time?

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Um... no, I don't want your damp egg, thanks...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take my eggs elsewhere then.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: A damp egg? No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take my eggs elsewhere then.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: I'd rather not. Thanks, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take my eggs elsewhere then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you care for an egg in this difficult time?

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: Oh, thanks.

lines.speaker: Lauretta
lines.text: This is some comfort to be sure.
